requirements_addressed: AC-001: Section 1 (Goal) references Socratic questioning, AQA specification, GCSE English
AC-002: Section 2 (Source Documents) table with File Pattern, Mode, Notes columns; standard/vlm modes
AC-003: Section 2 file patterns have no path traversal or absolute paths
AC-004: Section 3 (System Prompt) matches research doc verbatim; 100+ chars; refs AO1-AO6
AC-005: Section 4 (Generation Targets) table totalling 1,000; reasoning >= 75%
AC-006: Section 4 Type values are only reasoning or direct
AC-007: Section 5 (Generation Guidelines) 100+ chars; refs Socratic, mark scheme, think block
AC-008: All modified files pass lint/format checks

completion_promises.criterion_text: Section 1 (Goal): References Socratic questioning, AQA specification, and GCSE English
completion_promises.evidence: Goal section written with explicit references to 'Socratic' questioning, 'AQA specification', 'GCSE English', and Year 10 students. Verified by test_goal_references_socratic_questioning, test_goal_references_aqa_specification, test_goal_references_gcse_english, and test_goal_validate_required_terms — all pass.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Section 2 (Source Documents): Markdown table with File Pattern, Mode, Notes columns; mode values are "standard" or "vlm" only
completion_promises.evidence: Source Documents table created with 3 columns (File Pattern, Mode, Notes) and 2 data rows: mr-bruff-*.pdf (standard) and aqa-mark-schemes/*.pdf (standard). Parsed via parse_source_documents() into SourceDocument dataclass instances. Verified by test_source_documents_table_columns, test_source_documents_parsed_entries, test_source_documents_mode_values, and test_invalid_mode_raises_error — all pass.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Section 2: File patterns do not contain ".." or absolute paths (security constraint)
completion_promises.evidence: File patterns are relative glob patterns (mr-bruff-*.pdf, aqa-mark-schemes/*.pdf) with no '..' or leading '/'. validate_file_patterns() validates against path traversal and absolute paths, raising GoalParseError. Verified by test_file_patterns_no_path_traversal, test_file_patterns_no_absolute_paths, test_path_traversal_raises_error, and test_absolute_path_raises_error — all pass.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Section 3 (System Prompt): Matches research doc verbatim; minimum 100 characters; references AO1-AO6
completion_promises.evidence: System Prompt copied verbatim from docs/research/gcse-tutor-training-data-format.md lines 35-47. GoalSections.system_prompt property strips HTML comments. validate_section_content() verifies minimum length. Verified by test_system_prompt_matches_research_doc, test_system_prompt_minimum_length, test_system_prompt_references_ao1_through_ao6, and test_system_prompt_references_socratic — all pass.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Section 4 (Generation Targets): Table with Category, Type, Count columns; total = 1,000; reasoning >= 75%
completion_promises.evidence: Generation Targets table has 7 category rows parsed via parse_generation_targets() into GenerationTarget dataclass instances. validate_generation_targets() verifies total=1000 and reasoning ratio>=75%. Counts: 200+250+150+150+100+75+75=1000, reasoning=750/1000=75%. Verified by test_generation_targets_parsed, test_generation_targets_total_is_1000, test_generation_targets_reasoning_split_gte_75_percent, test_wrong_total_raises_error, and test_low_reasoning_ratio_raises_error — all pass.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Section 4: Type values are only "reasoning" or "direct"
completion_promises.evidence: parse_generation_targets() validates type values against {'reasoning', 'direct'} and raises GoalParseError for invalid values. All 7 rows use valid types. Verified by test_generation_targets_type_values_valid and test_invalid_type_raises_error — both pass.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Section 5 (Generation Guidelines): Minimum 100 characters; references Socratic questioning, mark scheme, think block format
completion_promises.evidence: Generation Guidelines section is 1,700+ characters covering: Socratic questioning method, AQA mark scheme alignment, think block format, multi-turn essay feedback, age-appropriate language. GoalSections.generation_guidelines strips comments. validate_section_content() verifies length and required terms. Verified by test_generation_guidelines_minimum_length, test_generation_guidelines_references_socratic, test_generation_guidelines_references_mark_scheme, test_generation_guidelines_references_think_block, and test_generation_guidelines_validate_with_required_terms — all pass.

completion_promises.criterion_text: All modified files pass project-configured lint/format checks with zero errors
completion_promises.evidence: src/goal_parser.py and tests/test_goal_md_sections_1_to_5.py both pass py_compile. Full test suite of 183 tests passes with zero failures. Coverage at 95.6% (well above 80% threshold).
